title: DC-TEST-003: Integration test harness (SQLite + Hono + env isolation) [POC]
body:
**Epic**: #10 Testing Infrastructure [POC]
**Iteration**: POC

In-memory SQLite test DB lifecycle, Hono test client wrapper, env variable isolation (save/restore), temp directory management with auto-cleanup.

title: DC-CLI-002: Interactive REPL mode [POC]
body:
**Epic**: #9 CLI Entrypoint and Session UX [POC → MVP-1]
**Iteration**: POC

Readline-based REPL with prompt, multiline input, command history, /help /exit /status slash-commands, and streaming output to stdout.

title: DC-AGENT-005: summarizer agent (LOW)
body:
**Epic**: #8 Agents Roster [POC → MVP-3]
**Iteration**: POC

Compress conversation/execution history into high-signal context summaries. Tools: conversation/history readers. Output: token-efficient summary with retained commitments.

title: DC-AGENT-004: planner-quick agent (MEDIUM)
body:
**Epic**: #8 Agents Roster [POC → MVP-3]
**Iteration**: POC

Fast operational plans for straightforward tasks. Tools: lightweight repo read/search + context readers. Output: compact ordered plan with success criteria.

title: DC-AGENT-003: code-explorer agent (MEDIUM)
body:
**Epic**: #8 Agents Roster [POC → MVP-3]
**Iteration**: POC

Read-only codebase reconnaissance. Tools: Read, Glob, Grep, AST search, LSP (read-only). Output: concise findings map with file-level evidence.

title: DC-CORE-012: Agent-tier model mapping
body:
**Epic**: #7 Agents Core Execution Framework [POC → MVP-1]
**Iteration**: POC

Configurable tier→model resolution: HEAVY/MEDIUM/LOW → model classes. Preferred + ordered fallback list. Resolver returns typed reason metadata (preferred/fallback/degraded).

title: DC-CORE-011: Delegation system
body:
**Epic**: #7 Agents Core Execution Framework [POC → MVP-1]
**Iteration**: POC → MVP-1

Delegation runtime: depth limit guard, parallel delegation with join/aggregation, complete delegation telemetry. POC: hardcoded. MVP-1: same APIs power LLM-assisted routing.

title: DC-CORE-010: Agent prompt builder
body:
**Epic**: #7 Agents Core Execution Framework [POC → MVP-1]
**Iteration**: POC

Reusable prompt assembly: system prompt templating, context injection (repo map/files/history/plan), tool binding per agent, model selection handoff.

title: DC-CORE-009: Agent execution sandbox
body:
**Epic**: #7 Agents Core Execution Framework [POC → MVP-1]
**Iteration**: POC

Per-invocation safety: token budget (tier x complexity), timeout controls, error isolation, tier-aware retry policy. Stop reasons: budget_exceeded/timeout/retry_exhausted/upstream_error.

title: DC-CORE-008: Agent communication protocol
body:
**Epic**: #7 Agents Core Execution Framework [POC → MVP-1]
**Iteration**: POC

Parent-child delegation protocol: context handoff envelope, parent-child graph metadata, configurable context inheritance rules, result propagation contract.

title: DC-CORE-007: Dispatcher agent runtime
body:
**Epic**: #7 Agents Core Execution Framework [POC → MVP-1]
**Iteration**: POC

Central coordinator: receives user request, picks target agent(s) via hardcoded routing table (POC), emits delegation/completion events. Extension point for MVP-1 LLM-based router.

title: DC-CORE-006: Agent registry
body:
**Epic**: #7 Agents Core Execution Framework [POC → MVP-1]
**Iteration**: POC

Registry for runtime agent discovery: getByName, listByTag, listByTier. Apply tier constraints at selection. Emit agent.registered/rejected events.
